placements.overview:
Established in 2001, Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College is a private institute in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 10 courses across 8 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College courses are provided in several streams including Engineering and Business & Management Studies, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 489 students. The fees at Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College ranges between INR 70,000 to 2,00,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

At the UG and PG levels, Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College course fee ranges between INR 70,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: Sakthi Mariamman Engineering College is one of the more reputed placement colleges. All these college students got placements in good companies in 2021. There are some additional placement charges collected by this college. The student's salary package is 4–8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college infrastructure is very awesome. The classrooms are very comfortable. Multiple laboratories and libraries are also available at this college. Boys and girls have separate hotels here at this college. Hostel foods are more hygienic. Some sports fields are also here at this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to study, and I gained knowledge here and also enjoyed a lot.

review_content.Placements: The college has a good placement cell for regular students. But there are very few opportunities for part-time students. Most of the part-time students search for a job on their own. Most of the students got placed after the course in top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is moderate. The library is huge, and foreign author books are also available. Hostel facilities are good. Sports are encouraged. The canteen food is average. The classrooms are well maintained, and the labs have sufficient equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: 100% dissatisfied due to lack of faculty and environment.

review_content.Placements: No placements will be provided, and nowadays there is no proper teaching is giving due to lack of staffs because salaries are not settled. If there is an inspection, they will arrange temporary staffs. Even they haven't given the balance amount to the students who need to be settled.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is incomplete. There is not a proper road, no proper ground for playing and hygienic canteen is not available. Still, now there is no development, and the building which was built is still incomplete, and there is no proper environment in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: The worst college with no campus interview, no lab facility and bad teaching.

review_content.Placements: The placements will be conducted but it is not from the reputed MNCs as only BPO companies will come for placements, even Adyar Student Xerox also will come for the placements and if they select the students in that college, they will make a big banner for that and they even put that as a very proud moment in the newspapers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lab facilities are average but not high-tech. It is the worst in conducting sports, and no cultural activities will be conducted inside the campus. The worst food will be provided by the canteen. The hostel facilities are also the worst, but the classrooms will be cleaned every day.

reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: SMEC is improving a lot nowadays in the respect of its infrastructure, faculty, and food at the hostel. Good place to learn and enjoy. Even the placements are really good. highlights.summary:
Approved by AICTE, Sha-SHIB Group of Institutions was established in 1991. The institute facilitates the students with latest technology and up to date educational curriculums to help them advance in their career field. The institute offers comprehensive technical courses along with programs in the fields of Management and Applied Sciences. The faculty teaches students in a conducive atmosphere creating a holistic learning environment.

Sha-Shib Group of Institutions has set in place a thorough and streamlined application process for admission that is required to be filled in the prescribed form. The admission process is based on rules and regulations set by Bangalore University and Govt. of Karnataka. The institute has its affiliation to Barkatullah University and provides multiple courses namely BBA, BCA, BE, AME, BSc, BCom, BA, B.Ed, MSc, MCom and PGDCA. Students are required to download the prospectus and application form from the website and fill the details. The same is then attached and submitted with the required documents along with Rs 20,000 as registration fee. Students clearing AME License exam are exposed to wider employment opportunities both in government and private sectors, private flying clubs, flying clubs, and air taxi, etc. After clearing AME License exam, students are handpicked by various organizations such as Indian Airlines, Alliance Air, Pawan Hans Limited, Flying Training Institutes of all states in India, U.B. Airways, Private Air Taxi Operators, H.A.L. (Hindustan Aeronautics Limited), N.A.L.(National Aeronautical Laboratory), Spice Air, among others. It offers highest salary highest salary package of Rs 7 LPA recording lowest salary range of Rs 3 LPA.

Check out details on Sha-Shib Group of Institutions Placements.

The institute offers Sha-Shib Scholarship & Aptitude Test (SSAT), an entrance test held at a national level. It is being conducted since 2011 for students who wish to seek admission in programmes associated with the aviation industry such as Aircraft Maintenance Engineering, Ground Staff, Cabin Crew/Airhostess, Commercial Pilot License, etc. offered by colleges under Sha-Shib Group of Institutions.

Candidates clearing this exam qualify for scholarship at the time of admission at different campuses, based across the India. The scholarship as fee concession/ fee waiver/ fee discount under any of the institutes that runs under the wing of Sha-Shib Group excluding the prevailing tax (if any) as per the prevailing Govt. rules.

placements.overview:
Approved by AICTE, Sha-SHIB Group of Institutions was established in 1991. The institute facilitates the students with latest technology and up to date educational curriculums to help them advance in their career field. The institute offers comprehensive technical courses along with programs in the fields of Management and Applied Sciences. The faculty teaches students in a conducive atmosphere creating a holistic learning environment.

Sha- Shib Group of Institutions is a private institute. Sha- Shib Group of Institutions is approved by AICTE and NCTE and offers a total of 82 courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in 21 specialisations such as Aeronautical Engineering, Aircraft Maintenance Engineering, Avionics, Biology and Biotechnology. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc., M.Sc., BCA and B.Com in Full Time mode. Sha- Shib Group of Institutions fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 18,000 to 6,25,000. Sha- Shib Group of Institutions has an annual seat intake of 88 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Humanities & Social Sciences. As per the recent Sha- Shib Group of Institutions placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 8,00,000. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Q. Which courses are offered by Sha-Shib Group of Institutions?

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Mechanical) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the good teaching staff and management, who are very cooperative.

review_content.Placements: The placement record of HAE is incredible over the last few years. In the last year, around 96% of students from our senior batches got placed. Companies like Air India, Indigo, Air Works, and Tata have tie-ups with the college. Our college comes under the Shashib group, which has its own 13 MROS.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are not more than 30 students in one classroom. The hostel is also good. The hostel has a 24x7 electricity supply and Wi-Fi.
review_content.Faculty: The teaching experience is very good. Their way of teaching is also good. They provide a practical explanation for topics that are not understood. Semester exams are not tough if we study according to the example related to it. They also provide good study materials.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Mechanical) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent choice for students aspiring to take admission in aviation.

review_content.Placements: 97% of students got placements in major airlines like Air India, Indigo, Air Works, Star Air, Tata, etc. Campus drive placements are also available. Most of the students got placed as junior technicians. Some got placed in Sha-Shib's own MRO located at Karad.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are particular labs for every department, such as the avionics lab, electric lab, engine lab, and airframe lab. A sports program is also conducted to enhance students' sportsmanship and teamwork. A large number of books are available in the library for every student, not only study-related but also other books.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Mechanical) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I visited Pune's most premium college, which is Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering.

review_content.Placements: 97.3% of students got internships from our colleges. Major companies like Indigo, Air India, and Tata come to the college campus for campus drive. During the internship period, the average package is Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month. After getting Licensed A.M.E., get a per-month 1 lakh average package.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering College is generally considered to be well-equipped and modern, providing a good learning environment for students. We have good labs and library where we get all DGCA books for DGCA exam.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Mechanical) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college faculty.

review_content.Placements: Excellent career in big companies like Indigo, Air India, Vistara, etc. Above 95% of students got placed in the last year, 2024. After got an A.M.E. licence company can pay Rs. 80,000- 1.20 salary per month. Payment varies from company to company, it also improves if you want to work away from India.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best library and classrooms. College also has the best sports. Environment and good accommodation in a hostel with the best Wi-Fi and food quality. Colleges have good parking and best practical rooms for knowledge of aircraft parts, which are taught in theory.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Avionics) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good Infrastructure and facilities .

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is 96%. The highest package is 3,600,000. The top recruiting companies are Air India, Indigo, Air Works and Star Air. 97% of students got internships from this course in Air India, Indigo, and Airworks. The top roles offered are Aircraft Maintenance Engineer, Planning Department, and Quality Department.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides us with beneficial theoretical and practical lectures. The hostel facility and the quality of food available are good.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty and instructors are helpful and provide proper knowledge. The faculty members are good at providing us with all the equipment, which gives us live experiences on aircraft and aircraft components.

reviews_list.batch_info: Certificate in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Avionics) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There are 120 students in our course. The average package is 12-15 LPA. The top recruiters are Air India, Indigo and Air Works. Currently, 96 percent of students have an internship. The top-most important role offered is a maintenance engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure are excellent at our college. Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. The hostel is good enough and a bed, a study table are provided. Wi-Fi and food are available in our college. Also, medical facilities are available. Sports days are also conducted in our college.

review_summary.college_name: Sha- Shib Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Certificate in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Mechanical) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the good teaching staff and management, who are very cooperative.

content.Placements: The placement record of HAE is incredible over the last few years. In the last year, around 96% of students from our senior batches got placed. Companies like Air India, Indigo, Air Works, and Tata have tie-ups with the college. Our college comes under the Shashib group, which has its own 13 MROS.
content.Infrastructure: There are not more than 30 students in one classroom. The hostel is also good. The hostel has a 24x7 electricity supply and Wi-Fi.
content.Faculty: The teaching experience is very good. Their way of teaching is also good. They provide a practical explanation for topics that are not understood. Semester exams are not tough if we study according to the example related to it. They also provide good study materials.

admission_process.title: Sha- Shib Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sha- Shib Group of Institutions admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education and Aviation.Sha- Shib Group of Institutionsadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asCBSE 12th and MPBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 18,000 - 6,25,000for UG, PG and Certificate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 2 years - 3 years.

As per Shiksha reviews, the highest salary package offered was in the range of Rs 5-7 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was Rs 3 LPA last yea r. Top companies such as SAIL, Indigo, Vistara, Qatar and Blue Dart visited the campus this year for placements.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 7 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the good teaching staff and management, who are very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: There are not more than 30 students in one classroom. The hostel is also good. The hostel has a 24x7 electricity supply and Wi-Fi.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent choice for students aspiring to take admission in aviation.
reviews.review_text: There are particular labs for every department, such as the avionics lab, electric lab, engine lab, and airframe lab. A sports program is also conducted to enhance students' sportsmanship and teamwork. A large number of books are available in the library for every student, not only study-related but also other books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I visited Pune's most premium college, which is Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering College is generally considered to be well-equipped and modern, providing a good learning environment for students. We have good labs and library where we get all DGCA books for DGCA exam.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college faculty.
reviews.review_text: The best library and classrooms. College also has the best sports. Environment and good accommodation in a hostel with the best Wi-Fi and food quality. Colleges have good parking and best practical rooms for knowledge of aircraft parts, which are taught in theory.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 3 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has good Infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: The college provides us with beneficial theoretical and practical lectures.  The hostel facility and the quality of food available are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 3 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure are excellent at our college. Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. The hostel is good enough and a bed, a study table are provided. Wi-Fi and food are available in our college. Also, medical facilities are available. Sports days are also conducted in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Hindustan Aerospace and Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 30 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There's Wi-Fi in both the hostel and college, clean and comfortable classes, and library for course-related books. The hostel atmosphere is good and lively. There are single rooms and double rooms. The food quality is good. There's sports week every year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sha Shib Aviation Academy, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Know about Aircraft Maintenance Engineering and Shashib Aviation Academy.
reviews.review_text: We had air-conditioned classrooms and a library for better studies. We had many labs for practical work, including a machine shop, battery shop, and other labs. We also had two aircraft. The hostel was clean, with average-sized rooms and bathrooms, but the hostel mess was not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sha-Shib College of Technology, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 30 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Teachers are not properly teaching. The infrastructure is bad. Classrooms are not up to level.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs do not work. There is no proper Wi-Fi. It has an average library and poorly managed labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Utkal Aerospace & Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 23 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Both the infrastructure and facilities are good but some basic hygienic is not maintained. Classrooms have air-conditioners. In the hostel, we have to stay with 3 people in a room or more than 6 people in a room. The charge for the hostel for 1 person is Rs. 7,000 with lunch, breakfast, and dinner. All the classrooms are pretty well.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Institute of Aeronautics and Engineering, Sha-Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 14 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive education with modern facilities and holistic development.
reviews.review_text:
Course infrastructure:
In the classroom, smart boards, projectors, and audio-visual aids for interactive learning. Workshop hands-on training space for engineering, mechanical, or other technical course. High-speed Wi-Fi & internet facility. Hostel infrastructure:
Low-furnished room with beds, study table, chair, and cupboard. Clean and hygienic bathroom with normal water. Nutritious meals served in a hygienic mess and drinking water facilities with RO purifier. 
24/7 security and CCTV facilitie...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sha-Shib College of Technology, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 1 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Inside Sha-Shib College : perspectives and academic.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is decent and a variety of courses are offered in our college. Hostel facility is also decent. Rooms for living are very good. Food is also good. Food is available three times a day, breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Non-vegetarian students can eat chicken on Sunday and vegetarian students can eat paneer.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Sha-Shib College of Technology, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 29 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sha-Shib College of Technology, Sha- Shib Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are amazing and SIRTE building, which is right next to ours doesn't even have half the facilities that we have. We are proud of the fact that our building has its own library, its own canteen, and its own student activity corners. Grounds and all are common and are shared by both SIRT and SIRTE students. Even the annual fest, SAGE Utsav, is common for both colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Utkal Aerospace & Engineering, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 23 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2023-24.
reviews.review_text: The A.M.E. Is a licensed course that provides all the facilities for study purposes they also provide Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms with AC, Library for study purposes. The food was totally hygienic and they provide the canteen facilities, medical facilities, sports and games facilities also.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sha Shib Aviation Academy, Sha- Shib Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 11 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The faculty is changing frequently.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, AC classrooms, projectors, library, fieldwork labs, and workshops like cutting metals, welding, riveting, etc. The college has two aircrafts, Cessna and Learjet, which is helpful to understand the students and get an idea on it. No ground, no sports. Hostel is good, food is average, no medical facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied by my faculty .

review_content.Placements: I, Amandeep Singh Malik, am currently pursuing a B.Tech in Computer Science from GRD IET (Guru Ram Das Institute of Engineering and Technology) in Bhatinda, Punjab. In my opinion, the placement of this college is a 4 out of 5; about 70% of the students are placed at this college. The highest package offered in my college is 20 Lacs per annum, the lowest package offered is 7 Lacs per annum, and the average package offered by any company is 10 Lacs per annum. The top recruiting company that came to my college is Microsoft. In my course, approximately 50 percent of the students got internships in HCL technologies. The top role offered in my course is executive engineer.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied by my faculty .

content.Placements: I, Amandeep Singh Malik, am currently pursuing a B.Tech in Computer Science from GRD IET (Guru Ram Das Institute of Engineering and Technology) in Bhatinda, Punjab. In my opinion, the placement of this college is a 4 out of 5; about 70% of the students are placed at this college. The highest package offered in my college is 20 Lacs per annum, the lowest package offered is 7 Lacs per annum, and the average package offered by any company is 10 Lacs per annum. The top recruiting company that came to my college is Microsoft. In my course, approximately 50 percent of the students got internships in HCL technologies. The top role offered in my course is executive engineer.

paragraphs: ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Humanities and Social Sciences and Science.

Some of the popular ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur programmes are BBA and B.A., etc at UG level and MBA/PGDM and M.A. at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur admissions:

courses_data.name: ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur B.Sc. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: B.Sc. at ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur is a 3 years UG course in the field of Science and Medicine & Health Sciences. ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur accepts students based on ICRI Written Test and Rajasthan JET Agriculture. The final selection for admission to the ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur B.Sc. course is based on the student's performance in the mentioned exams. See below the eligibility for ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur B.Sc.:

courses_data.name: ICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur BBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Candidates interested in the fields related to Business & Management Studies can enroll in theICRI - Jagannath University, Jaipur BBAprogramme, which lasts for 3 years. Candidates are not required to appear for any entrance exams as the admission process is merit-based. The final shortlist for admission to the BBA programme is determined by the candidates' academic scores.

college_info.college_name: Akula Sree Ramulu College of Engineering: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Akula Sree Ramulu College of Engineering admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers a wide range of programmes at UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Engineering. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech. Akula Sree Ramulu College of Engineering fee structure ranges between INR 74,600 to 1,40,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is the best for every student.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, 50 students got jobs in ONGC, and our seniors also got placements. Almost 70% of the students got jobs in MNC and other companies. The highest salary offered is Rs. 1,00,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Total of 50 companies visited our campus. Almost 90% of the students got internships from college.
review_content.Infrastructure: WI-FI is available on the campus. Labs are comparable for students, and classrooms are very good. The library is very important because every book is available. Medical facilities provided are also very good, and every week, health checkup and eye campaign are provided. Sports and games are also available in the evening.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I spent the best days of my life here.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of this college. Students of our senior batch got jobs in ONGC, Odalarevu. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 18,000 per month. The students of our batch are still studying, and we attended the interviews at ONGC, Odalarevu. I got placed in ONGC.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi are very good. There were no issues here. Other facilities like labs, classrooms, and library are very comfortable for all the students. Medical facilities are also provided all the time. Other facilities like hostel are also available here. Even the hostel rooms are very comfortable for all the students. Sports activities are also organised in the evening, and other activities like cricket tournaments are conducted on holidays.

review_summary.college_name: Akula Sree Ramulu College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Beautiful college to study in.

content.Placements: About this college, there are not many placements as it's a private college. The highest salary offered for the course is 12 LPA. More companies have offered us. We got many internships. The lowest package for our college is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, labs are fully equipped and have better equipment. Classrooms are good, and benches are better. Our library has many books; we often used to go to the library to check the books also on other semester-related topics. Many sports are encouraged by our college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: In 2015 was nice with full strength but at present I don't know.

content.Placements: College and atmosphere was nice. Some placements happen like small companies only for B.Tech students not for Diploma students. Once upon a time we got good placements. Salary expected is based on company.
content.Infrastructure: College hostel was nice and play grounds also. Government hostels are there near by college. Medical facilities is okay, sports and games is also well because students do not go to classes. They are always in playing mood so games is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best for every student.

content.Placements: In our batch, 50 students got jobs in ONGC, and our seniors also got placements. Almost 70% of the students got jobs in MNC and other companies. The highest salary offered is Rs. 1,00,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Total of 50 companies visited our campus. Almost 90% of the students got internships from college.
content.Infrastructure: WI-FI is available on the campus. Labs are comparable for students, and classrooms are very good. The library is very important because every book is available. Medical facilities provided are also very good, and every week, health checkup and eye campaign are provided. Sports and games are also available in the evening.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I spent the best days of my life here.

content.Placements: I am a student of this college. Students of our senior batch got jobs in ONGC, Odalarevu. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 18,000 per month. The students of our batch are still studying, and we attended the interviews at ONGC, Odalarevu. I got placed in ONGC.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi are very good. There were no issues here. Other facilities like labs, classrooms, and library are very comfortable for all the students. Medical facilities are also provided all the time. Other facilities like hostel are also available here. Even the hostel rooms are very comfortable for all the students. Sports activities are also organised in the evening, and other activities like cricket tournaments are conducted on holidays.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: ASR College of Engineering rating would be 2.

content.Placements: There are the worst placements in ASR College of Engineering, and though the college brings placements, they are not useful in our future. The placements are offered in Maha Electronic company which is the worst. This company paid only one lac per annum, and you should have a bike.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. The computer lab is of old model but is okay, it is working well. The projector is average. The mechanical machines are okay and electrical machines are average. The CSE labs are okay. I would rate the infrastructure as 3.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful college to study in.
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs are fully equipped and have better equipment. Classrooms are good, and benches are better. Our library has many books; we often used to go to the library to check the books also on other semester-related topics. Many sports are encouraged by our college.

reviews.review_heading: In 2015 was nice with full strength but at present I don't know.
reviews.review_text: College hostel was nice and play grounds also. Government hostels are there near by college. Medical facilities is okay, sports and games is also well because students do not go to classes. They are always in playing mood so games is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for every student.
reviews.review_text: WI-FI is available on the campus. Labs are comparable for students, and classrooms are very good. The library is very important because every book is available. Medical facilities provided are also very good, and every week, health checkup and eye campaign are provided. Sports and games are also available in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: I spent the best days of my life here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi are very good. There were no issues here. Other facilities like labs, classrooms, and library are very comfortable for all the students. Medical facilities are also provided all the time. Other facilities like hostel are also available here. Even the hostel rooms are very comfortable for all the students. Sports activities are also organised in the evening, and other activities like cricket tournaments are conducted on holidays.

reviews.review_heading: ASR College of Engineering rating would be 2.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The computer lab is of old model but is okay, it is working well. The projector is average. The mechanical machines are okay and electrical machines are average. The CSE labs are okay. I would rate the infrastructure as 3.

reviews.review_heading: Need to verify your college before joining.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. It will not be safe. They don't repair any infrastructure if it breaks, even the fans are not available in summer. We don't set in the classroom because of weather, the labs are hot, and very old classrooms, but the playgrounds are good. The medical facility is available.

Faculty is the most important person in the college. They should be good in teaching. We had faculty members and some of them are good in teaching also. Campus facilities and campus life is average. reviews_list.review_title: Overall, a good college to take admission.

review_content.Placements: Placement in RemTech is not up to the mark. They give 100% placement but the companies in which you get placed have a very bad working environment. So, from the placement point of view, this is not a good college. The placement in our batch is very good but where we get placed, the working environment is very bad. So, we all left the job. The average salary offered is 150000/annum. Companies that visited the campus are not so reputed but are of average standards.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. It has a separate academic block, separate administrative block, separate labs and computer block. The mess is also very good but the condition of the washrooms is very bad because of students only. Wi-Fi facility is not so good over there. Labs are fully equipped with related machinery. Medical assistance is also very good, there are separate rooms for those students who fell ill. The quality of food in the mess is very bad but the food you get in the canteen has a good quality. Hostel facilities were there with good furniture.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Please do not take admission here because of its a total waste of time, money and the future.

review_content.Placements: The placement is not good because it is a newly set up college. It got around 7 years till it opened but the college placement cell is still the same. The number of students is approximately 10 per batch/per year. and the salary ratio is around 10000 per month. The kinds of roles offered by the company were of a very down level. The college does not provide any internship for the students, so students have to find out themselves about internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure like the computer lab, a library and Wi-Fi but there is no medical facility, sports facility and games facility. The quality of labs is nice and the classroom looks good. The food quality is not just like home as they provide food just like of a local dhaba. The hostel room is good, clean but it has some congestion. Sometimes, I faced the problem regarding the infrastructure but no action was taken by them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure was good but facilities were less

content.Placements: 78% placement record. 26lpa- 3lpa- 6lpa, is the highest, lowest and average salary package offered. Maximum got placed in global logic. 44% in Global logic, Netsmartz, etc. IT & software engineers, Marketing, etc. roles were offered. Multiple companies came in first 4 year of college opening but later no company came which led to collapse of this college .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good but facilities were less, I was the day scholar. Mess food was okay but it could be improved. Sports and games are only done at sport events. Canteen was small and you are allowed to sit there only in leisure time else teacher will ask you why you are outside even if the lecture is free.

review_content.General: Our college hostel is good. The hostel provides good food, and it provides both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food separately. The hostel has many facilities like Wi-Fi, hot water and many more. In our college, the infrastructure is very nice. Classrooms are good and vast, and the library contains all departments' books. There are good labs also, where we can implement our own thoughts.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: College is good for learning. Infrastructure is attractive, and events are useful.

review_content.Placements: The salary package offered is 1.2-4 LPA for CSE. Campus placements are excellent for CSE and ECE students in good companies. The MBA department is excellent in our college, and they conduct joyful events. Every department has placements, but civil students get fewer companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is available for the whole day. All department books are available in the library, and not only curriculum books but also magazines and author books are available. Labs are well-equipped and maintained, and canteen food is also good. Wi-Fi is not available for the whole day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Eelctronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Don't waste your 4 years of valuable career by joining this college.

review_content.Placements: My friends who got a job on campus interviews did not get the joining letter except from Justdial that too in the marketing field. The package they were offered was 2.6 L/A. My friends studied in the electronics field but they settled in the sales field. Thus, there are poor placements in this college but when compared to SVCE and AITS college, Sree Rama conducts placement drives regularly.
review_content.Infrastructure: Presently, this college offers Wi-Fi only for faculty member but they are planning to give free Wi-Fi on the campus to all the students with help from Reliance Jio. Classrooms are maintained and are very clean. The wide rooms make you comfortable. The library contains outdated books, they offer a book bank scheme. You need to pay 4000 to the library and they will give you the semester books. After the semester, you have to return them back. The money will not be refunded to you. No medical facilities are there except for fever, cold and headache tablets available in the college. Coming to sports, this college is awesome and they conduct volleyball, kabaddi, cricket etc. The canteen is the first bad impression of this college as the food is poor.

Not just this, it has also been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 2.8 on placements, 2.5 on faculty and 3.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Shree Rama Educational Society Group Of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with our college infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: In our college, the management provides 100% placements for students who have good academic record and skills. The highest salary package offered in our college until now was 9 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Our placement cell management is very good. They will interact with students from the second year onwards to motivate them to get a good job.
content.Infrastructure: Our college hostel is good. The hostel provides good food, and it provides both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food separately. The hostel has many facilities like Wi-Fi, hot water and many more. In our college, the infrastructure is very nice. Classrooms are good and vast, and the library contains all departments' books. There are good labs also, where we can implement our own thoughts.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: College is good for learning. Infrastructure is attractive, and events are useful.

content.Placements: The salary package offered is 1.2-4 LPA for CSE. Campus placements are excellent for CSE and ECE students in good companies. The MBA department is excellent in our college, and they conduct joyful events. Every department has placements, but civil students get fewer companies.
content.Infrastructure: The library is available for the whole day. All department books are available in the library, and not only curriculum books but also magazines and author books are available. Labs are well-equipped and maintained, and canteen food is also good. Wi-Fi is not available for the whole day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Eelctronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Don't waste your 4 years of valuable career by joining this college.

content.Placements: My friends who got a job on campus interviews did not get the joining letter except from Justdial that too in the marketing field. The package they were offered was 2.6 L/A. My friends studied in the electronics field but they settled in the sales field. Thus, there are poor placements in this college but when compared to SVCE and AITS college, Sree Rama conducts placement drives regularly.
content.Infrastructure: Presently, this college offers Wi-Fi only for faculty member but they are planning to give free Wi-Fi on the campus to all the students with help from Reliance Jio. Classrooms are maintained and are very clean. The wide rooms make you comfortable. The library contains outdated books, they offer a book bank scheme. You need to pay 4000 to the library and they will give you the semester books. After the semester, you have to return them back. The money will not be refunded to you. No medical facilities are there except for fever, cold and headache tablets available in the college. Coming to sports, this college is awesome and they conduct volleyball, kabaddi, cricket etc. The canteen is the first bad impression of this college as the food is poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017

content.Other: Infrastructure is good and pleasant atmosphere but the college is too far from city. It has a class auditorium with large sitting. It provides with good hostel, but the food id average. It has approx. 24 buses. It has good labs for CSE branch and an opportunity for CSE students for placement in MSS miracle software.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college environment, and teachers are helpful.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our batch got placed in good companies. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro and HCL visit our college for placements. About 70% of the students got an internship in good companies. Overall, placements in our college need improvement. Our college also tries its best to provide the best placements for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were average. Smart and digital classrooms were available in departments. Wi-Fi facility was provided to all the students in the college. Our college provides huge ground for sports and games. Gym facility and security were also available on the campus. Quality of food served in the mess was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with this college

review_content.Placements: About 60% of students were placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 23,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 35,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys visited the campus. Top roles offered is a software developer, engineer trainee. The highest salary package offered in our course is 4.4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 3.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no good facilities in our college. Classrooms are of poor condition, and the whole college is confined in 9 classes. Very poor infrastructure only one lab is provided for a batch of 50 students. No electricity is provided, and no Wi-Fi facility is provided to the students. Students are harassed in many different ways financially and mentally, and students are not treated as humans. The hostel is empty. Students are not allowed for the preparation of their respective exams they are willing to do. All the placements occurred in the college is the hard work of students only.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The subject that is tough for you might be very easy to study and grasp for your friend, who finds it interesting. For example, you may find Electromagnetic Wave Theory very tough because of the various technicalities and Engineering theory that it deals with. But, for your friend, it might be fun to learn, as it gives them a channel to learn, explore, and experiment with something new.

individual_reviews.title: Come to this college and read wholeheartedly, succeed touches your feet.

content.Placements: About 20% of students are placed in campus placement. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lower package is 2.8 LPA. About 75% of students got an internship in the role of a software analyst. Cardekho and Mobility have selected many of the students with the lower package.
content.Infrastructure: Around 24-hour Wi-Fi connection with high Mbps and library is only open during college time, not the whole time. Sports and games are available 24 hours. A gym room is also available during the day and evening in the hostel. Girls are not allowed in the boys' hostel.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and having a well maintained labs for all courses.

content.Infrastructure: pretty good classrooms, hostel canteens etc. Quality of the food is not so good but it's good. For third and final year students, there is 2-week training about personality development. All labs are fully Air-conditioned and neat and clean for the students.

paragraphs: Sachdeva Institute of Technology admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. The college also provides the hostel facility. There is an equipped gym for hostlers. The hostel rooms were clean. I didn't face any issues with the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with some faculty members. The placement was good in 2007.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is good. Wi-Fi, all types of labs are available in this college. Classrooms are good, and the library is available. Medical facilities are available 24 hours, and a sports club is available. A canteen is also available on the campus, and hostel rooms are good and comfortable. I did not face any infrastructure related issue in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty but placements are the worst. Go at your own risk because placements are almost zero.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was only for hostel students. Labs were not good and not that bad as well, and the library is well equipped, and I am not sure about medical facilities because I never needed them during college life. Sports and games facility is very good as there is sports meet every year. Even you can participate in tech fest there, and there is updated information about the upcoming events in nearby colleges in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. Library and labs are good, but not classrooms. Facilities are available for every game and sport. The college hostel is just near the college. Bus facilities are also available. I think the quality of food provided in the mess is not good.

reviews.review_heading: College is not supportive for students.
reviews.review_text: When we talk about the infrastructure, I would say that there is not much infrastructure here as only three building are there with one playground and no attraction. The garden here is very poor and not maintained. There are many trees which form the perfect show of the college. Also, back side of the college building a very bad area is present.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college facilities regarding the education and sports are average.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi are not available. The classroom standards are average not good or not bad. The library is good. There are no such facilities for medical and for sports and games. The labs are not as good as anyone expects. The infrastructure is not brilliant but not bad as well.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied  because of good placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is average. Labs and classroom were average. The library is good. Medical facilities were average. 
Sports and games were good. Food in the canteen is good. 
Hostel rooms were good. Monkeys come into the classes and in the hostel too.

It is a place where each student's skills are enhanced. Our college gives a lot of opportunities in all terms. Faculty members have in-depth knowledge about the subjects and put great efforts on individuals. Computer lab certified by TCS. Organizes various workshops, seminars, guest lectures, industrial visits, etc. Provides placement with reputed companies. Overall experience is nice. Holding a degree without a job is something you are handing a piece of paper worth Rs4 Lakhs but of no use. So overall college is not good as they are not working to improve their placement services. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Kopal Institute of Science and Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Engineering. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech. Kopal Institute of Science and Technology fee structure ranges between INR 36,000 to 91,200.

faqs.answer: A:    Kopal Institute of Science and Technology offers Degree and Diploma courses including 5 UG and 2 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Kopal Institute of Science and Technology has specializations such as After 10th Diploma specializations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Kopal Institute of Science and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offered by Kopal Institute of Science and Technology are After 1th Diploma, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. Kopal Institute of Science and Technology offers specializations such as After 10th Diploma specializations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are available at Kopal Institute of Science and Technology for students?

faqs.answer: A:    Kopal Institute of Science and Technology courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Kopal Institute of Science and Technology goes up to 462.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good students and teachers.

review_content.Placements: Rajiv Gandhi is one of the best colleges in Bhopal, as we explore ourselves and get better opportunities compared to other colleges for B.Tech. I'm fortunate enough to be a part of this college, and a good percentage of students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available here, whether it's canteen, library or anything else. The hostel is pretty good and comfortable for students. Medical facilities are available. Different sports and games are available for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is good for students who cannot afford expensive colleges.

review_content.Placements: Almost 30% of students get placed every year. Most of the recruiting companies are tech companies. Approximately 3 LPA is the lowest package offered, and 8 LPA is the highest package offered. Eicher, Tech Mahindra, TCS, TVs, Hero Motors, etc., companies come here. 40% of students interested got internships. Technical analysis, machine specialist, operation manager, etc., are the best roles offered in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lots of facilities are available. Machine lab, a huge library with lots of books related to course and self help, work room, canteen, free Wi-Fi, 25+ air-conditioned classrooms, etc., are available. Lathe machine, UTM machine, and hydraulic machines are the specialties of the college.

faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at Kopal Institute of Science and Technology for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: Kopal Institute of Science and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together. Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %. Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate % excluding grace marks. Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis. OR Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch of Engg./Technology with above mentioned percentage. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%. Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance (i.e. IITs/ IISc/NITs etc.) duly recognised by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basi

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Placements are not good. The highest salary package offered was 18 LPA. The average salary package offered was 4.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. There are no internships in this college, and you have to go off-campus for internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. There is no Wi-Fi in this college except for the library. It also provides a huge library. There are 3 hostels for boys in this college. The food served in the hostel is good. If you do not like hostel food then you can go for tiffin service. Tiffin service is also provided. It also has a sports complex with essential sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good. I am from the technical branch. Many non-technical or IT companies visit our college for placements. We were provided with special training in non-technical courses like C, DBMS, etc., to get a placement in non-technical companies.
content.Infrastructure: It has the best infrastructure and hostel. The hostel provides a free Wi-Fi facility but with daily limits. The hostel has a lift facility. The cleanness of the hostel and college is the best. Hygienic food is provided with a variety of the menu. Both college and the hostel have an RO water facility. Proper lab facilities are provided with the equipment.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good students and teachers.

content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available here, whether it's canteen, library or anything else. The hostel is pretty good and comfortable for students. Medical facilities are available. Different sports and games are available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is good for students who cannot afford expensive colleges.

content.Placements: Almost 30% of students get placed every year. Most of the recruiting companies are tech companies. Approximately 3 LPA is the lowest package offered, and 8 LPA is the highest package offered. Eicher, Tech Mahindra, TCS, TVs, Hero Motors, etc., companies come here. 40% of students interested got internships. Technical analysis, machine specialist, operation manager, etc., are the best roles offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Lots of facilities are available. Machine lab, a huge library with lots of books related to course and self help, work room, canteen, free Wi-Fi, 25+ air-conditioned classrooms, etc., are available. Lathe machine, UTM machine, and hydraulic machines are the specialties of the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our university is average.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were average. Mainly IT companies recruited students from the college. Around 30-40% of the students got placed mainly in IT companies. The average salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA - 4 LPA. The highest salary package offered varies from 6 LPA - 7 LPA. Most of the students go for open campus or for competitive exams like GATE, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Most of the colleges in the university were private colleges, so they don't have a proper hostel and other facilities. Most of the students stay outside the campus in rented apartments. Very fewer sports facilities are provided in most of the colleges. Extra-curriculum activities are very less.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good. There is no Wi-Fi in this college except for the library. It also provides a huge library. There are 3 hostels for boys in this college. The food served in the hostel is good. If you do not like hostel food then you can go for tiffin service. Tiffin service is also provided. It also has a sports complex with essential sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has the best infrastructure and hostel. The hostel provides a free Wi-Fi facility but with daily limits. The hostel has a lift facility. The cleanness of the hostel and college is the best. Hygienic food is provided with a variety of the menu. Both college and the hostel have an RO water facility. Proper lab facilities are provided with the equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good students and teachers.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available here, whether it's canteen, library or anything else. The hostel is pretty good and comfortable for students. Medical facilities are available. Different sports and games are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for students who cannot afford expensive colleges.
reviews.review_text: Lots of facilities are available. Machine lab, a huge library with lots of books related to course and self help, work room, canteen, free Wi-Fi, 25+ air-conditioned classrooms, etc., are available. Lathe machine, UTM machine, and hydraulic machines are the specialties of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our university is average.
reviews.review_text: Most of the colleges in the university were private colleges, so they don't have a proper hostel and other facilities. Most of the students stay outside the campus in rented apartments. Very fewer sports facilities are provided in most of the colleges. Extra-curriculum activities are very less.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with low fees structure and highest placement records.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus for all students. Our college provides proper classrooms, proper labs and also a library. Hostel facilities were good, and the quality of the food available in the mess and canteen was moderate. Sports are also played on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure, a good library and a good mess.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was better and also canteen facilities, but mess facilities were average. Medical facilities were also average, and there were many opportunities for students who are interested in sports. Classrooms were good. There was a huge computer lab, where around 150 students can accommodate at a time. There were very good library facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, and teachers, learned a lot over there.
reviews.review_text:
All the facilities were enough to learn, less practical classes, hostel was decent with good food including the warden and fellow hostelers
Good environment, positive teachers. Students were competitive with lots of extracurricular activities including fests.

reviews.review_heading: Overall satisfied with the college but there is a chance of improvement.
reviews.review_text:
1. Facilities and infrastructure available for the students was quite good It has well-equipped libraries, computer labs and Wi-Fi campus. 
2. The quality of the facilities was quite good in the hostel. The sports and events were also very competitive and medical facilities were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for placements and is affordable for economically backwards students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility works best in our college, and labs are always clean. The hostel quality is better, not bad. The food served is great, and low medical facility available as it is a government college. Sports and games facilities are always available compared to other good colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Here, you have all the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, libraries, medical facilities, sports, garden and much more. Teachers are good, and the college working hours are good. This college is one of the best colleges in Madhya Pradesh, and you have to give an entrance exam for admission.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of poor faculty, no placement and poor mechanical infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Campus is beautiful and is spread over 250 AC. You can enjoy nature, greenery and hills. But college is not up to date as labs are still have 2005 computers which don't work. Mechanical Branch does not have good labs, workshop are not good. Library is good but not useful.

reviews.review_heading: UIT-RGPV: one of the biggest campus with great environment.
reviews.review_text: Being spread in 240 acres lush green campus, it is one of the biggest campus in Madhya Pradesh as well as India. It has one of the best Library I have ever been to with a lot of resource available for the students to gain as much knowledge as he can. Being a old campus, classrooms are not that advanced but it is decent. First Aid box is with every guard of the department and also there is one medical room where we can go to if we need one. faqs.answer: Ganapathy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Ganapathy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology offers specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Communications Engineering, Electrical Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Ganapathy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: Ganapathy Chettiar College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Ebenezer Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Sc. The Ebenezer Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 1,50,000 to 7,40,000.

review_content.Placements: Most of my seniors get placed in my course. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The average package offered is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are TCL, Infosys, HCL, HDFC Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, etc. Our seniors got placed in many companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are facilities like a computer lab, library, and classrooms for all semester students. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of the food is also good. The canteen is also a bit okay. Medical facilities are there for students. Sports classes are also allocated in the schedule.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This review is based on my personal experience.

review_content.Placements: Ebenezer Group Of Institutions have affiliation with many multinational companies. It is sure that students get job in one or another company since Ebenezer have multiple campus interviews. They can study with appointment order when it comes to the end of 3rd year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Ebenezer Group Of Institutions provides a pleasant atmosphere for students to study. The quality of the food is overall good because they have to satisfy all students across the nation. Here they have facilities for outdoor games. Wi-Fi is a available through the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing + International Nursing - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Just an average college.

review_content.Placements: The B.Sc. Nursing classes are filled with around 60+ students. When I joined the course, my package was 525000, and yearly, the college is increasing it. Unfortunately, there are no placements provided for nursing students. However, all the students secure internships at Manipal Hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Students have no Wi-Fi access in either the college or the hostel. There is a single library available for all departments in the institution. While we have good classrooms and labs equipped with all necessary facilities, the issue lies in having only one restroom for the eight students sharing a room, which proves insufficient.

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.
