review_summary.college_name: Ebenezer Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Ebenezer Group of Institutions.

content.Placements: Students should only get pass marks to get admissions to our college. Many companies visit our college to recruit students for our course. It provides the best internship programs for us. In our college, almost all students get jobs through internships.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, all the facilities are available like the library, good class surroundings, IT labs, etc. It conducts sports activities. The hostel provides enough facilities including good food, mess, and canteen. They are allowing students for outings all Sunday and Saturday. It has separate hostels for both boys and girls.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has absolutely affordable fees and very approachable faculty members.

content.Placements: Most of my seniors get placed in my course. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The average package offered is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are TCL, Infosys, HCL, HDFC Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, etc. Our seniors got placed in many companies.
content.Infrastructure: There are facilities like a computer lab, library, and classrooms for all semester students. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of the food is also good. The canteen is also a bit okay. Medical facilities are there for students. Sports classes are also allocated in the schedule.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This review is based on my personal experience.

content.Placements: Ebenezer Group Of Institutions have affiliation with many multinational companies. It is sure that students get job in one or another company since Ebenezer have multiple campus interviews. They can study with appointment order when it comes to the end of 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: Ebenezer Group Of Institutions provides a pleasant atmosphere for students to study. The quality of the food is overall good because they have to satisfy all students across the nation. Here they have facilities for outdoor games. Wi-Fi is a available through the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing + International Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Just an average college.

content.Placements: The B.Sc. Nursing classes are filled with around 60+ students. When I joined the course, my package was 525000, and yearly, the college is increasing it. Unfortunately, there are no placements provided for nursing students. However, all the students secure internships at Manipal Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Students have no Wi-Fi access in either the college or the hostel. There is a single library available for all departments in the institution. While we have good classrooms and labs equipped with all necessary facilities, the issue lies in having only one restroom for the eight students sharing a room, which proves insufficient.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Canteen must improve.....

content.Placements: The lowest package is about 1.25 Our instituion is well know for medical/business studies etc. The top roles offered in my course is lab tech jobs in all hospitals. Paramedical alone has about 8-9 different streams. Students are being sent to recognized insitutes for interships, for example manipal hospital. Our institute is also associated with rajeev gandhi university of health science.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty decent. We have our own library, labs, instruments for medical department. The toilets and the classrooms are clean, we have our own tv is every class to be able to project our ppt's and projects. All though they had a canteen but it's irregular could say... sometimes it's open and most times it's not. That's one thing that needs some improvement.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Ebenezer Group of Institutions for B.Sc.?
faqs.answer: To get admission to the B.Sc. in Nursing programme at Ebenezer Group of Institutions in Bangalore, Karnataka, you must meet the following requirements:Pass 10+2 or II PUC with a minimum of 45% aggregate marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology.Pass English as a separate paper.Candidates from SC/ST or other backward classes must meet the mentioned marks in PCB papers together.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Ebenezer Group of Institutions for admission to B.Sc.?
faqs.answer: No entrance test is required to join Ebenezer Group of Institutions to enroll for B.Sc. degrees. The main entrance mode is merit in the qualifying exam:Eligibility: The candidates should have passed in 12th with minimum percentage (usually around 45% for general categories) with relevant subjects, depending on the respective B.Sc. course.No Entrance Test: No entrance test has to be given by the Institute itself in order to procure B.Sc. admission there, hence students can acquire their entry through their academic profile only.Application Process: The interested candidates can apply directly with an application form, including all the necessary documents with it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ebenezer Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all the facilities are available like the library, good class surroundings, IT labs, etc. It conducts sports activities. The hostel provides enough facilities including good food, mess, and canteen. They are allowing students for outings all Sunday and Saturday. It has separate hostels for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: It has absolutely affordable fees and very approachable faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are facilities like a computer lab, library, and classrooms for all semester students. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of the food is also good. The canteen is also a bit okay. Medical facilities are there for students. Sports classes are also allocated in the schedule.

reviews.review_heading: This review is based on my personal experience.
reviews.review_text: Ebenezer Group Of Institutions provides a pleasant atmosphere for students to study. The quality of the food is overall good because they have to satisfy all students across the nation. Here they have facilities for outdoor games. Wi-Fi is a available through the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Just an average college.
reviews.review_text: Students have no Wi-Fi access in either the college or the hostel. There is a single library available for all departments in the institution. While we have good classrooms and labs equipped with all necessary facilities, the issue lies in having only one restroom for the eight students sharing a room, which proves insufficient.

reviews.review_heading: Canteen must improve.....
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty decent. We have our own library, labs, instruments for medical department. The toilets and the classrooms are clean,  we have our own tv is every class to be able to project our ppt's and projects. All though they had a canteen but it's irregular could say... sometimes it's open and most times it's not. That's one thing that needs some improvement.

reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: I chose this college because of the good teaching and discipline here, and this is a well-disciplined and the best college in Kota. The alumni network is not so good though, all are average. The senior students help in the studies, notes etc. The placements are not good as only local companies come to the college and select 15-20 students. The campus life is average, the campus is not too large and it is compact. But the garden is good. I never lived in the hostel life as I live separately in a room itself. But the hostel life is good and safe for the students. The exam structure is very good as there is a written exam and before the main exam three types of exams are there which is overall good. At my time the fee structure was 42000 per year. It is not high compared to the other colleges and is average so anybody can afford. There is no extra fees other than the original.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Review of R. N. Modi Engineering College.

content.Placements: In our batch, about 20% of the students got placed. The salary offered to the students is Rs.15,000 to 20,000 per month. There are many requirements in our course. Every company prefer mechanical engineering students. The lowest salary package of 2 LPA and the average salary package of 3 LPA and the highest salary package of 5 LPA are offered in our course. Almost 100% of the students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very empowering, and labs are clean. The Wi-Fi facility works very well, and the classrooms are huge. The library is decent for us. The hostel is decent, not very good, but it is clean. The food mess is available near the hostel. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also available in our college.

individual_reviews.title: The campus is average, but not many good opportunities are provided.

content.Infrastructure: The campus has labs, but the Wi-Fi facility is restricted. Many classrooms, library, sports and games rooms are available. Students can practise and play any game with no restrictions. The canteen is available for a limited time. I didn't face any issues with the infrastructure of our college.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,Bhopal is up to 630. Good thing to know is that Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,Bhopal has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My journey at Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: At the third year, I will be eligible for the placements. There are many companies that come into the college, like HUL, TATA, Axis Bank, etc., and in reality, in my B.Com. course, I never heard that they placed any students. They provide good placements in college. They placed students who had master's degree, ITI, etc. The average package that I heard from them is approximately 10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many festivals that we celebrate, like the freshers party, 15th august, annual function, cultural festival, teachers day etc. There are many sports activities they provide like cricket, hockey, basketball, etc. In Barkatullah University, students lives are good but not very good and not bad either. If you want enjoyment, don't join the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and development.

review_content.Placements: Placement of my college is excellent. Students are eligible for placement after their 4th semester or before it. Many top companies are visited and their offers are highly paid. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Amazon, Flipkart, Godrej, Tata group, etc. The highest placement of my college is 15 LPA and the average is 2.5 LPA and it is also based on profiles of companies and job roles. More than 50-60 percent of students are getting placed and the remaining students don't want placement. My plans is to get placed in private banks.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every month at the college organizes some functions, fests, orientations, seminars, DJs, concerts, and all every month they are doing any new things. The library has two and a half floors and offers books on every subject, fiction, stories, and books from all over. More than 2000 books are available in the library; if students want any book, they can borrow it for some days. The development ashram includes some college-run social groups. And help the needy people's distribution of food to educate the students to help the person. All the sports are viral in college with coaches; if the student wants to play at a state or national level, they help to reach the level.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024

answer.text: Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology, Bhopal has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together. Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %. Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate % excluding grace marks. Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis. OR Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICTE approved Indian University or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or Institute recognised by the concerned University as equivalent thereto. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 45%. The Bachelor's degree must be of minimum three years duration after passing Higher Secondary (10+2) examination of (10+2) system or equivalent. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Candidate who has passed qualifying examination with grace marks are also eligible for admission. Candidates whose qualifying examination marksheet are based on grading system has to produce conversion of grade to marks.

review_summary.college_name: Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Low staff, and fees are unclear.

content.Placements: 150 students were in my mechanical branch. There was no such placement in college, and no company came here. This was the worst college for placement or job opportunities. There was low staff in the college, and in my branch, there were only 2 teachers. Think about how me manage to pass the semester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, this college looked good and looked strong brick by brick, security was good, but the facilities were not so good. The canteen was so bad, nothing was there to eat, just chips and samosas. No sports in college. Fees structure is so bad, some have Rs. 10,000, some have Rs. 15,000.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not sufficient for students.

content.Placements: Our college provided some job placements in the previous year. This year, we expect more of the same. But in my perspective, there will be a lot more career prospects for students. The training and placements cell organises a wide range of exercises, self-detraction roles, acting group debates, and simple writing for the pupils. The salary package offered is around 2.5 LPA - 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels have top-notch amenities including Wi-Fi access for students and college faculty members, systems, 24/7 water, and electricity. There is a bed for everyone. Meals are of good quality for their amount. We must be registered and pay the college accommodation fee. There are rented rooms. Some students live near the college on rent. Hostel facilities for both boys and girls are available on the college campus. Transport facilities are provided by the college management. A cafe and a big indoor table tennis arena are hidden by its star exterior.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My journey at Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,Bhopal.

content.Placements: At the third year, I will be eligible for the placements. There are many companies that come into the college, like HUL, TATA, Axis Bank, etc., and in reality, in my B.Com. course, I never heard that they placed any students. They provide good placements in college. They placed students who had master's degree, ITI, etc. The average package that I heard from them is approximately 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: There are many festivals that we celebrate, like the freshers party, 15th august, annual function, cultural festival, teachers day etc. There are many sports activities they provide like cricket, hockey, basketball, etc. In Barkatullah University, students lives are good but not very good and not bad either. If you want enjoyment, don't join the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and development.

content.Placements: Placement of my college is excellent. Students are eligible for placement after their 4th semester or before it. Many top companies are visited and their offers are highly paid. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Amazon, Flipkart, Godrej, Tata group, etc. The highest placement of my college is 15 LPA and the average is 2.5 LPA and it is also based on profiles of companies and job roles. More than 50-60 percent of students are getting placed and the remaining students don't want placement. My plans is to get placed in private banks.
content.Infrastructure: Every month at the college organizes some functions, fests, orientations, seminars, DJs, concerts, and all every month they are doing any new things. The library has two and a half floors and offers books on every subject, fiction, stories, and books from all over. More than 2000 books are available in the library; if students want any book, they can borrow it for some days. The development ashram includes some college-run social groups. And help the needy people's distribution of food to educate the students to help the person. All the sports are viral in college with coaches; if the student wants to play at a state or national level, they help to reach the level.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very good teacher behavior.

content.Placements: The institute has a placement cell that ensures good jobs and placements for students in various well-established companies. The top recruiters of the institute are Dell, Infosys, TCS, Apollo Tyres, Genpact, etc. Laxmipati Group of Institutions, Bhopal, is a private institute established in 2007. It is affiliated with Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya (RGPV), Bhopal, and has been approved by AICTE.
content.Infrastructure: The college organizes a tech fest every year, along with sports competitions and other festivals. College seniors also run various groups, such as cultural groups and student counseling groups. The fee structure for students is not well organized, as it costs a lot of money for B.Tech courses. However, the curriculum of the course is not that deserving; in my class, I paid 85,000 a year plus miscellaneous charges.

reviews.review_text: Hostels have top-notch amenities including Wi-Fi access for students and college faculty members, systems, 24/7 water, and electricity. There is a bed for everyone. Meals are of good quality for their amount. We must be registered and pay the college accommodation fee. There are rented rooms. Some students live near the college on rent. Hostel facilities for both boys and girls are available on the college campus. Transport facilities are provided by the college management. A cafe and a big indo...

reviews.review_heading: My journey at Laxmipati Institute Of Science & Technology,Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: There are many festivals that we celebrate, like the freshers party, 15th august, annual function, cultural festival, teachers day etc. There are many sports activities they provide like cricket, hockey, basketball, etc. In Barkatullah University, students lives are good but not very good and not bad either. If you want enjoyment, don't join the college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and development.
reviews.review_text: Every month at the college organizes some functions, fests, orientations, seminars, DJs, concerts, and all every month they are doing any new things. The library has two and a half floors and offers books on every subject, fiction, stories, and books from all over. More than 2000 books are available in the library; if students want any book, they can borrow it for some days. The development ashram includes some college-run social groups. And help the needy people's distribution of food to educat...

reviews.review_heading: Very good teacher behavior.
reviews.review_text: The college organizes a tech fest every year, along with sports competitions and other festivals. College seniors also run various groups, such as cultural groups and student counseling groups. The fee structure for students is not well organized, as it costs a lot of money for B.Tech courses. However, the curriculum of the course is not that deserving; in my class, I paid 85,000 a year plus miscellaneous charges.

reviews.review_heading: My Engineering Journey at My College
reviews.review_text: Campus life is great, and we had different cells for the same. The college used to host sports meets and cultural fests where people used to showcase their talent. The classrooms were well-equipped with both practical and theoretical environments. Hostels are nearby the institute. Medical facilities are also available during the academic period.

reviews.review_heading: My honest opinion on Laxmipati Institute.
reviews.review_text: The name of the annual function is Samrat Utsav, which takes place in both winter and summer seasons. There are many performances given by students, and they show their art and skills. In this college, there is a sports complex for badminton, table tennis, chess, ludo, carrom, and outdoor games like volleyball, football, and cricket.
